arts.ttl: Multiple factors make club ‘regret’ their transfer decision with Bournemouth player
arts.sum: Milos Kerkez arrived at AFC Bournemouth from AZ Alkmaar in July 2023 and made 28 league appearances for the Cherries last season. The left-back has cemented his place at Bournemouth this season, making 12 starts in the Premier League.
